RT-IoT2022 — Data Preprocessing Pipeline¶

Design Principles¶

  • No data leakage — preprocessing fit only on training data
  • Stratified Train / Validation / Test split (70 / 15 / 15)
  • Splits created once and never changed (fixed random seed)
  • Explicit feature accounting — kept vs removed with reasoning
  • Same fitted transformer reused for val, test, XAI, rule extraction

0. Imports & Paths¶

Mounted at /content/drive

Imports complete. Random seed: 42
Data path: /content/drive/MyDrive/MLmodeling/XAI/Datasets/RT-IoT2022/RT_IOT2022.csv

2. Data Cleaning¶

2.1 Duplicate Detection & Removal¶

Duplicate rows found: 0
Shape after deduplication: (123117, 85)

2.2 Missing Value Check¶

No missing values found.

2.3 Infinite Value Check¶

No infinite values found.

2.4 Constant Feature Removal¶

Dropped 1 constant columns: ['bwd_URG_flag_count']

3. Feature Accounting — Leakage Prevention¶

Explicit log of every removal decision.

=== Feature Accounting Log ===

REMOVED FEATURES:
  x no: Row index / counter — not a network feature, not available at prediction time

TARGET            : Attack_type -> binarized to Normal (0) vs Attack (1)
KEPT - Numeric    : 80 features
KEPT - Categorical: ['proto', 'service']

Unique labels in target column:
['ARP_poisioning', 'DDOS_Slowloris', 'DOS_SYN_Hping', 'MQTT_Publish', 'Metasploit_Brute_Force_SSH', 'NMAP_FIN_SCAN', 'NMAP_OS_DETECTION', 'NMAP_TCP_scan', 'NMAP_UDP_SCAN', 'NMAP_XMAS_TREE_SCAN', 'Thing_Speak', 'Wipro_bulb']
Binary label distribution:
label
0     12507
1    110610
Name: count, dtype: int64
  Normal (0) : 12,507
  Attack (1) : 110,610
  Imbalance ratio : 8.84x

4. Label Engineering — Binary Classification¶

Per project spec: Normal vs Attack (binary).
RT-IoT2022 labels all rows with specific traffic types. Legitimate IoT device communications are treated as Normal (0); all attack traffic as Attack (1).

Binary label distribution:
label
1    110610
0     12507
Name: count, dtype: int64
  Normal (0) : 12,507
  Attack (1) : 110,610
  Imbalance ratio : 8.84x

Note: Significant class imbalance — F1, F2, ROC-AUC, PR-AUC are primary metrics (per project spec)

5. Stratified Train / Validation / Test Split¶

70% Train | 15% Validation | 15% Test — stratified on binary label.
Splits created once with fixed seed and never changed.

=== Split Sizes ===
  Train      : 86,181 rows (70.0%)
  Validation : 18,468 rows (15.0%)
  Test       : 18,468 rows (15.0%)

=== Stratification Check ===
  Train -> Normal: 10.16% | Attack: 89.84%
  Val   -> Normal: 10.16% | Attack: 89.84%
  Test  -> Normal: 10.16% | Attack: 89.84%

6. Preprocessing Pipeline¶

Fit only on X_train. The same fitted transformer is applied to val, test, XAI, and rule extraction.

  • Numeric -> median impute -> StandardScaler
  • Categorical (proto, service) -> most_frequent impute -> OneHotEncoder(handle_unknown='ignore')
Preprocessor fitted on X_train only.

Processed shapes:
  X_train : (86181, 93)
  X_val   : (18468, 93)
  X_test  : (18468, 93)

7. Reconstruct Feature Names¶

Named features are required for SHAP, LIME, and rule extraction.

8. Sanity Checks¶

=== Check 1: No NaN in processed arrays ===
  train: clean
  val: clean
  test: clean

=== Check 2: No Inf in processed arrays ===
  train: clean
  val: clean
  test: clean

=== Check 3: Feature count consistency ===
  train=93, val=93, test=93
  Consistent: YES

=== Check 4: Row count matches labels ===
  train: X=86181, y=86181 -> OK
  val: X=18468, y=18468 -> OK
  test: X=18468, y=18468 -> OK

=== Check 5: Train means ~ 0 (StandardScaler applied correctly) ===
  id.orig_p: 0.0
  id.resp_p: 0.0
  flow_duration: 0.0
  fwd_pkts_tot: -0.0

10. Preprocessing Summary¶

============================================================
      RT-IoT2022 — PREPROCESSING SUMMARY
============================================================
  Raw rows             : 123,117
  After deduplication  : 123,117
  Missing values       : 0
  Infinite values      : 0
  Removed features     : ['no']
  Input features       : 82
  After OHE            : 93

  SPLITS (stratified, seed=42):
    Train : 86,181  (70.0%)
    Val   : 18,468   (15.0%)
    Test  : 18,468   (15.0%)

  LEAKAGE PREVENTION:
    Preprocessor fit on X_train only
    No target-correlated or index features
    Val/Test never seen during fitting

  DOWNSTREAM USAGE (modelling notebook):
    -> Load preprocessors/preprocessor.joblib
    -> Wrap as Pipeline([preprocessor, model]).fit(X_train_raw, y_train)
    -> Use processed CSVs + feature_names.csv for SHAP/LIME
============================================================

Preprocessing Complete¶

File Purpose
splits/X_train.csv / y_train.csv Training data (70%)
splits/X_val.csv / y_val.csv Validation data (15%)
splits/X_test.csv / y_test.csv Test data (15%) — final eval only
preprocessors/preprocessor.joblib Fitted transformer — reuse for XAI & rules
preprocessors/feature_names.csv Named features for SHAP / LIME
preprocessing_metadata.json Full reproducibility record
